title: SIGIL Mural — UI fidelity rubric
purpose: A falsifiable, machine-scored test of how faithfully a generated UI reproduces the SIGIL mural. Each criterion is measured from a headless Chromium render (pixels + DOM), not from human judgement. Total 100.

ground_truth.source_art: ChatGPT Image Jun 1, 2026 04_22_26 — the painterly 8-panel SIGIL mural
ground_truth.layout: 4x2 grid of 8 panels inside a gilt frame; SIGIL cartouche top; master-equation plate bottom
ground_truth.thread: ONE continuous crimson red line through all 8 panels (boustrophedon), the stationary worldline / fabric +10% thread

criteria.measure: ≥4 of the 6 signature colors present (sampled pixels within dist<70); dark-purple background present
engine exposes exactly 8 panels AND DOM legend renders 8 entries
crimson pixels present in BOTH vertical halves AND span left-third → right-third (continuity)
gold pixels in the border ring AND 'SIGIL' present in DOM
bright-pixel count above blank threshold (composition is not a flat fill)
__mural.frame advances over 600ms AND two renders differ (the red line flows)
all 8 term labels present: δS/δg δS/δA δS/δφ δS/δJ δS/δK δS/δΣ '∮ fold' 'Σ → ∞'
